steps.title: Use the current-time signal
steps.content: The word 'Currently' signals a present state: where Anguissola's painting is now. The blank should use simple present tense to describe that present display.

steps.title: Choose present tense
steps.content: Choice A is future perfect, Choice C is simple past, and Choice D is past progressive. The remaining choice uses simple present tense, matching the present-time signal. The answer is B.
